events.description: Scene 1 begins — title 'The Final Query' fades in
Recursive resolver node slides in from left
Query dot travels from resolver toward auth nameserver
Auth nameserver node slides in from right with 'google.com' label
Auth nameserver starts glowing — it has the data
EUREKA moment — pulse ring + scale pop + 'HAS THE ANSWER' badge appears
Scene 2 crossfades in — 'IP Address Returns Through The Chain'
Data packet dot travels from auth nameserver to resolver
Data packet dot travels from resolver to browser
Scene 3 crossfades in — browser celebration with IP received badge
Timer counter starts counting up from 0ms with progress bar filling
Final range badge '20-120 milliseconds' pops in with glow — satisfying conclusion
